changeLogMessages: Added new callback for the `AddAWSService` and similar methods allowing customization of the service client config before being used to create the service client. For example the callback can be used to configure the `HttpClientFactory` with an implementation coming from the DI using the `IHttpClientFactory` provided by Microsoft.
Note: Callers passing a literal null as the second argument to AddAWSService or AddKeyedAWSService may need to cast (e.g., (AWSOptions)null) to resolve overload ambiguity.
